flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at East Los Angeles College rose 27% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at East Los Angeles College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.0k → $10.6k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at East Los Angeles College fell 11% between 2007 and 2010 (24.5% → 21.9%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at East Los Angeles College rose 240% between 2007 and 2010 (9.2k → 31.3k).
